metadata.title: Why Claude, handed ten tools for one request, sometimes picks the wrong one
metadata.purpose: The tool_choice parameter (auto/any/required) plus description specificity reshape invocation probability; ambiguous descriptions leave the routing to chance.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro am_onyx) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.visual_object: A request entering a decision node with three outgoing tool branches, one highlighted as descriptions sharpen
metadata.hook: The same request could fire several tools; the choice hinges on tool-description clarity and one hidden parameter — and vague descriptions route it wrong.

beats.narration_text: "What time is sunset?" could call `calendar_tool` or `astronomy_tool`. With near-identical descriptions Claude picks unpredictably; sharpen one ("returns exact time and refraction offset") and the request routes to the tool that truly owns the answer.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: What information drives Claude toward one tool instead of an equally plausible alternative?
The same request could fire several tools; the choice hinges on tool-description clarity and one hidden parameter — and vague descriptions route it wrong.
The tool_choice parameter (auto/any/required) plus description specificity reshape invocation probability; ambiguous descriptions leave the routing to chance.
beats.visual: A request entering a decision node with three outgoing tool branches, one highlighted as descriptions sharpen
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: "Estimate the expense" → calculator vs statistical_tool vs budget_estimator; identical blurbs → coin-flip; add a distinguishing clause → deterministic route.
The tool_choice parameter (auto/any/required) plus description specificity reshape invocation probability; ambiguous descriptions leave the routing to chance.
